velocity_posts.text:
My hands close tight around her neck

Her eyelids flutter

I press harder, harder, harder

Her thighs stop trembling, her arms go limp, the death-vice of her legs wrapped around my waist loosens as she fades away

Pulsing, grunting, I fill her

Release my grip

She gasps, weakly

"I... Love... you"

I do think any good or worthwhile review will ultimately leave some of yourself on the table; art only goes so far and it is how we react to art that defines how we talk about it. 

Earnest art will almost always do this no matter what, and I think a lot of people don't see what gets left behind.
